2LT trim package

NO dings, dents, scratches, rim rash, or upholstery tears
1 owner

Title: 1998 Chevrolet Corvette
Description:
I would like to introduce to you "Sensation" - as she is known around the shop.

What started out as a plain jane, no pizzaz, bluh Corvette - has turned into this sensation you see here. I started by removing the body side moldings, filling chips, and hours of color sanding, compounding, and polishing to get the all original paint to have this absolutely stunning, mile deep, beautiful distinction of image finish you see here.

I added a little rear ducktail spoiler which really changes things up and gives her a little attitude.

9x17 and 10x18 brand new kustom wheels were installed to really set her off. I then pinstriped them in red to pay homage to the redline tires of the 60s and the 1978 pace car.

The glass removable roof panel was refurbished. The original blue tint didn't fit my vision and was a little delaminated so it was sanded down. A few coats of Kandy Black were added followed by multiple urethane coats, and polished to perfection. From the exterior it looks black - but from the inside it still affords all the see through clarity as stock.

You will notice the 2000 Heritage style graphic that I painted on the hood.

Title: 2001 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible
Description:
This 2001 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible is in excellent condition with only 32,000 miles. The red exterior with black leather interior looks great with the top down. It has a 5.7L V8 engine with automatic transmission that delivers smooth power.

Key features include:
Dual power seats with leather upholstery
Premium sound system with multi-disc CD player
Power convertible top
Premium wheels
Traction control and ABS braking
All power accessories including windows and locks
Heads up display
Tilt-n-tel display
Cruise control
Auto headlights
F45 selective real time dampening suspension
NOT A SCRATCH ON THE CAR
EVERYTHING WORKS PERFECTLY
COLD A/C

The mileage is lower than average for this year, and the price reflects good value.
